subcodes.first_line: The Ancient Sovereign calleth aloud from the horizon of the world, proclaiming: O My people and My branches! Concerning that which hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مالک قدم از افق عالم ندا مینماید و میفرماید یا حزبی و یا شعبی در آنچه ظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @call to action
